primary_changes: Added score capture functionality to status endpoint
Implemented score improvement and effectiveness calculations
key_additions: baselineScore and postImplementationScore fields in validation schema
Detailed score tracking in status transition logic

patterns_discovered: Granular score tracking across recommendation lifecycle
Flexible handling of implementation status changes
gotchas_discovered: Requires baseline score when starting implementation
Post-implementation score mandatory when completing recommendation
Complex logic for resetting timestamps and scores during status changes

approach_outcome.scope: Comprehensive status endpoint update with advanced score tracking

recommendations: Add comprehensive unit tests for score calculation logic
Consider adding more detailed error messages for score capture failures
Document the new score tracking requirements for API consumers
Implement client-side validation to mirror server-side score requirements
